title: Catherine the Last
writer: Sándor Hunyady, Felix Jackson, Károly Nóti
actors: Franciska Gaal, Hans Holt, Hans Olden
plot: Hans, an idle young man, must find a way to reach her beloved one against her rich father's firm opposition. He finds it through enamoring Katharina, the scullery maid, a simple and straight young girl.
